ValidationRule.description: This is to ensure the settings are configured based on the supported scenario: Edu Institution Edu Institution + Study Program Edu Institution + Study Unit Edu Institution + Study Program + Study Unit IPE IPE + Study Unit
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( NOT(ISBLANK(Educational_Institution__c)) && NOT(ISBLANK(Individual_Program_Enrollment__c)), NOT( OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Educational_Institution__c)), ISBLANK(Study_Program__c), ISBLANK(Study_Unit__c) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Educational_Institution__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Study_Program__c)), ISBLANK(Study_Unit__c) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Educational_Institution__c)), ISBLANK(Study_Program__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Study_Unit__c)) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Educational_Institution__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Study_Program__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Study_Unit__c)) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Individual_Program_Enrollment__c)), ISBLANK(Study_Unit__c), ISBLANK(Study_Program__c) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Individual_Program_Enrollment__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Study_Unit__c)), ISBLANK(Study_Program__c) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid settings. The supported combination are: (1) Edu. Institution, (2) Edu. Institution + Study Program, (3) Edu. Institution + Study Unit, (4) Edu. Institution + Study Program + Study Unit, (5) Program Enrollment, (6) Program Enrollment + Study Unit.
